description: A Phoenix LiveView Hover Card component.
docs:
Add to the `html_helpers` function in your `my_app_web.ex`:

    import MyAppWeb.Components.UI.HoverCard

Replace `MyAppWeb` with your application's module prefix.

files.content:
defmodule MyAppWeb.Components.UI.HoverCard do use Phoenix.Component attr :id, :string, default: nil attr :class, :string, default: nil slot :trigger, required: true slot :inner_block, required: true def hover_card(assigns) do ~H"""
{render_slot(@trigger)}
{render_slot(@inner_block)}
""" end end

name: hover-card
title: Hover Card
